name: gut
description: Giulia Enders's Gut — digestive health toolkit revealing the inside story of the body's most underrated organ, from how digestion works to the microbiome, gut-brain connection, and practical gut health advice
useCase: Understand digestion anatomy, manage common digestive problems, explore the gut-brain axis, evaluate probiotics, and improve gut health through diet
knownRisks: The book is written for a popular audience — specialists may find it oversimplified
Some claims (especially about the microbiome) may be updated by newer research
The author's recommendations are general — individual digestive issues require medical evaluation
